projectDescription: A Mac utility that automatically downloads macOS Firmwares and Installers for Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
keyFeatures: Download macOS Firmware Restore files (.ipsw) for Apple Silicon Macs with SHA-1 checksum validation
Generate macOS Installer Applications (.app), Disk Images (.dmg), Bootable ISOs (.iso), and Packages (.pkg)
Support for macOS versions from Mac OS X Lion 10.7 through macOS Tahoe 26
Filter downloads by compatibility with the current Mac hardware
Export firmware/installer lists as CSV, JSON, Property List, or YAML
Optional codesigning for Disk Images and Packages
Configurable Software Update Catalogs including Standard, Customer Seed, Developer Seed, and Public Seed
Download caching to speed up repeated build operations
Automatic retries with configurable retry count and delay
Privileged Helper Tool for operations requiring elevated privileges
Unified logging system integration for monitoring and debugging
Bootable Installer creation for macOS Big Sur and newer on Apple Silicon, and macOS Yosemite and newer on Intel
publicApiSurface: Firmware.supportedBuilds() — retrieves supported firmware builds for the current Mac
MistError — error enum covering download, validation, and I/O failures
Hardware.architecture — detects Apple Silicon vs Intel
HelperToolCommandType — XPC command types for the Privileged Helper Tool
